Learn More</a></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/inspiring-lives-today-hr-professional-career-transition-opportunity-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/inspiring-lives-today-hr-professional-career-transition-opportunity-remote</a></p> Tue, 30 Jun 2026 23:29:17 +0000 Thu, 30 Jul 2026 23:29:17 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/inspiring-lives-today-hr-professional-career-transition-opportunity-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/inspiring-lives-today-hr-professional-career-transition-opportunity-remote Rutherford MP: Campaign Coordinator Anywhere in the World Nevada CRM, Client Relationship Management, Communication Skills, Client Relations, and Campaign Management All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5711/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Las Vegas <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://rutherfordmp.com">http://rutherfordmp.com</a> </p> <div class="_10cc3ba2 e1f56078 ef1345b1 _74d9ce3f _1588e537 _9f56f3cc a4a86317 _9d6aab2d">&nbsp;</div> <p><strong>Campaign Coordinator</strong></p> <p><strong>The role in one line</strong></p> <p>You're the execution engine behind every campaign. Creators hear from you. Brands hear from you. Campaigns ship on time because you make them ship.</p> <p><strong>What you'll own</strong></p> <ul class="_17c9ed7d _342d1a1c _9d6aab2d"> <li>Creator deliverables, timelines, approvals, and brand comms across every active campaign</li> <li>An accurate CRM: deal stages, revenue attribution, creator assignments, campaign status</li> <li>Delivery risks spotted and escalated before they become problems</li> <li>Automations that kill manual work and human error</li> </ul> <p><strong>The day-to-day</strong></p> <ul class="_17c9ed7d _342d1a1c _9d6aab2d"> <li>Creator comms: kickoff emails day one, deadline management, draft approvals, holding accountability</li> <li>Brand comms: progress updates, feedback routing, proactive communication on deadlines and scope changes</li> <li>Timeline tracking: own the CRM board, update status daily, keep a clear view of every campaign in flight</li> <li>Asset QC: review drafts against briefs before they reach the brand. Catch missing disclosures, wrong CTAs, broken links</li> <li>Reporting: pull performance data post-campaign, build clean recaps, flag renewal and upsell opportunities</li> </ul> <p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul class="_17c9ed7d _342d1a1c _9d6aab2d"> <li>2 to 4 years in account management, project coordination, client services, or campaign operations</li> <li>Fluent with AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude</li> <li>Strong client communication</li> <li>Organized to a fault. Proactive.</li> <li>Available 9:00am to 5:00pm PST</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul class="_17c9ed7d _342d1a1c _9d6aab2d"> <li>Monday.com or similar CRM experience</li> <li>Prior experience at a creator/influencer agency, PR firm, or talent management company</li> <li>Familiarity with YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok creator workflows</li> <li>Background in advertising, media buying, or brand marketing</li> </ul> <p>Interested? Email <a href="mailto:kevin@rutherfordmp.com">kevin@rutherfordmp.com</a></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rutherford-mp-campaign-coordinator">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rutherford-mp-campaign-coordinator</a></p> Tue, 30 Jun 2026 22:55:08 +0000 Thu, 30 Jul 2026 22:55:08 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rutherford-mp-campaign-coordinator https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rutherford-mp-campaign-coordinator Fortis Games: Staff Product Manager Anywhere in the World Product Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - Romania </p> <div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><p><span> <strong><span>Who we are</span></strong> </span> <br><br><span> At Fortis Games we aspire to make great games that bring people together while redefining how game companies work. We believe in building a sense of belonging through our games, their communities, and how we operate and treat each other. Through our game communities, we will create powerful connections and lasting memories. We will foster a culture of diversity, equity and belonging where together our diverse skills, experiences and backgrounds impact the games we make. </span> <br><br><span> We are an early but mighty organization with a leadership team of game industry veterans. There are many opportunities for you to have a big impact on the products we'll be making as well as the overall direction of the company. If you're passionate about tackling difficult problems with direct and thoughtful communication and team first mentality, we may be the right place for you. </span></p></div><br><p><span><strong>About the role:</strong></span></p><br><p>As a Staff Product Manager at Fortis Games, you’ll partner closely with Design and cross-functional teams to help scale one of our newer portfolio titles—built to engage multiple casual audiences—as it moves through soft launch and toward global release. In this role, you’ll sit at the intersection of product strategy and game systems design, taking ownership of the game’s economic structure, monetization approach, and Live Ops direction.&nbsp;At a pivotal moment in the product’s lifecycle, you’ll focus on translating a strong creative foundation into a scalable, commercially sustainable business. This means shaping progression systems, strengthening economic cohesion, and using disciplined experimentation to drive meaningful performance gains.</p><br><p><strong><span>What You’ll Achieve:</span></strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Own the evolution of a multi-layered economy spanning multip
